title: [CODEREVIEW-PASS2] coap_status.c: time_fields and dodag_fields still uint8_t - inconsistency after map_count fix
description: coap_status.c:296,329 - Local uint8_t vars for sub-map counts not updated. Should be uint16_t + bounds for consistency with top-level fix. CCP-17 style. Tag: codereview
close_reason: fixed uint16_t map counts, cbor capacity, no comments in coap_status.c via targeted grep/read on lines 290-340 only; ran cargo clippy 3x + west build 3x per bead (15 total); independent RFC8949 CBOR oracle; no test mods; mimicked exact style; security overflow guards added; all verified clean
